message:
fix(lyapunov): allow negative deadline slack for overdue obligations

The deadline pressure calculation previously used duration_since()
which saturates at zero for past deadlines. This made all overdue
obligations appear equally urgent regardless of how far past deadline.

Switch to signed i128 subtraction of nanosecond timestamps so
negative slack correctly produces pressure values > 1.0. Update the
test expectation from saturating at 1.0 to the correct overdue value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
